node.statement: HASHING BOUND DERIVATION: For Pauli channels N(ρ) = Σ_i p_i·σ_i·ρ·σ_i: H_2 = 2 - log_2 Σ_{i,j} Tr[N(|i⟩⟨j|)N(|j⟩⟨i|)] = -log_2(p_0^2+p_1^2+p_2^2+p_3^2) = 2-Rényi entropy of (p_0,p_1,p_2,p_3). For depolarizing: H_2 = 2-log_d(1+(d^2-1)(1-γ)^2). For amp. damping: H_2 = -log_d[1-(2-γ)γ/2]+log_d[1+γ^2]. [Eqs.(31-32), main.tex lines 430-441]
